question_text.en: Which AWS service or feature is used to send both text and email messages from distributed applications?
question_text.zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或功能用於從分散式應用程式傳送文字和電子郵件？

A.en: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)
A.zh: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

B.en: Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES)
B.zh: Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES)

C.en: Amazon CloudWatch alerts
C.zh: Amazon CloudWatch 警報

D.en: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)
D.zh: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：Amazon SNS 使用主題和訂閱將應用程式通知分散到終端節點，包括 SMS 文字訊息和電子郵件。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon SNS uses topics and subscriptions to fan out application notifications to endpoints that include SMS text messaging and email.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon SES 傳送電子郵件，但不提供 SMS 文字訊息傳送，因此它無法滿足這兩個所需的管道。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon SES sends email but does not provide SMS text-message delivery, so it cannot satisfy both required channels.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：CloudWatch 警報偵測指標條件並且可以呼叫通知目標，但 CloudWatch 本身並不是同時傳送簡訊和電子郵件訊息的服務。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudWatch alarms detect metric conditions and can invoke notification targets, but CloudWatch itself is not the service that delivers both SMS and email messages.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon SQS 是用於解耦應用程式元件的訊息佇列。它不會直接向訂閱者傳送簡訊和電子郵件通知。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon SQS is a message queue for decoupling application components. It does not directly deliver both SMS text messages and email notifications to subscribers.

answer_text.zh: A. Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)
answer_text.en: A. Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (97%) 3%。考點摘要：Amazon SNS 使用主題和訂閱將應用程式通知分散到終端節點，包括 SMS 文字訊息和電子郵件。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (97%) 3%. Key point: Amazon SNS uses topics and subscriptions to fan out application notifications to endpoints that include SMS text messaging and email.

question_text.en: A user needs programmatic access to AWS resources through the AWS CLI or the AWS API. Which option will provide the user with the appropriate access?
question_text.zh: 使用者需要透過 AWS CLI 或 AWS API 以程式設計方式存取 AWS 資源。哪個選項將為使用者提供適當的存取許可權？

A.en: Amazon Inspector
A.zh: Amazon Inspector

B.en: Access keys
B.zh: 存取金鑰

C.en: SSH public keys
C.zh: SSH 公鑰

D.en: AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys
D.zh: AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 金鑰

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Inspector 執行自動化漏洞管理，並且不會為 AWS CLI 或 API 請求頒發憑證。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Inspector performs automated vulnerability management and does not issue credentials for AWS CLI or API requests.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：存取金鑰提供存取金鑰 ID 和秘密存取金鑰，可對透過 AWS CLI 或 AWS API 發出的程式碼請求進行驗證。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Access keys provide an access key ID and secret access key that can authenticate programmatic requests made through the AWS CLI or AWS APIs.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：SSH 公鑰對計算例項的作業系統登入進行身份驗證，並且不授權 AWS API 請求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: SSH public keys authenticate operating system logins to compute instances and do not authorize AWS API requests.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS KMS 金鑰加密和解密資料；它們不是 CLI 或 API 存取的憑證。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS KMS keys encrypt and decrypt data; they are not credentials for CLI or API access.

answer_text.zh: B. 存取金鑰

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。考點摘要：存取金鑰提供存取金鑰 ID 和秘密存取金鑰，可對透過 AWS CLI 或 AWS API 發出的程式碼請求進行驗證。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Key point: Access keys provide an access key ID and secret access key that can authenticate programmatic requests made through the AWS CLI or AWS APIs.

question_text.en: A company runs thousands of simultaneous simulations using AWS Batch. Each simulation is stateless, is fault tolerant, and runs for up to 3 hours. Which pricing model enables the company to optimize costs and meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Batch 執行數千個同步模擬。每個模擬都是無狀態的、容錯的，並且執行時間長達 3 小時。哪種定價模式使公司能夠最佳化成本並滿足這些要求？

A.en: Reserved Instances
A.zh: 預留例項

B.en: Spot Instances
B.zh: 競價型例項

C.en: On-Demand Instances
C.zh: 按需例項

D.en: Dedicated Instances
D.zh: 專用例項

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：預留執行個體是基於承諾的折扣，可實現穩定的 EC2 使用，不適合可使用備用容量的短期容錯批次作業。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Reserved Instances are commitment-based discounts for steady EC2 usage and do not fit short, fault-tolerant batch jobs that can use spare capacity.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：Spot 執行個體使用折扣的備用 EC2 容量，非常適合可容忍中斷的短期、無狀態、容錯模擬。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Spot Instances use discounted spare EC2 capacity and are well suited to short, stateless, fault-tolerant simulations that can tolerate interruption.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：按需執行個體可以在無需承諾的情況下執行作業，但其價格高於中斷容忍工作負載的 Spot 容量。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: On-Demand Instances can run the jobs without commitment, but their price is higher than Spot capacity for an interruption-tolerant workload.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：專用例項以額外成本提供單一租使用者硬體隔離，而模擬工作負載不需要此功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Dedicated Instances provide single-tenant hardware isolation at additional cost, which the simulation workload does not require.

answer_text.zh: B. 競價型例項

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (87%) 13%。考點摘要：Spot 執行個體使用折扣的備用 EC2 容量，非常適合可容忍中斷的短期、無狀態、容錯模擬。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (87%) 13%. Key point: Spot Instances use discounted spare EC2 capacity and are well suited to short, stateless, fault-tolerant simulations that can tolerate interruption.

question_text.en: What does the concept of agility mean in AWS Cloud computing? (Choose two.)
question_text.zh: 敏捷性概念在AWS雲端運算中意味著什麼？ (選擇兩項。)

A.en: The speed at which AWS resources are implemented
A.zh: AWS 資源實施的速度

B.en: The speed at which AWS creates new AWS Regions
B.zh: AWS 建立新 AWS 區域的速度

C.en: The ability to experiment quickly
C.zh: 快速試驗的能力

D.en: The elimination of wasted capacity
D.zh: 消除容量浪費

E.en: The low cost of entry into cloud computing
E.zh: 進入雲端運算的低成本

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：敏捷性的一部分是快速部署和實施AWS資源的能力，這使得使用者能夠快速回應業務需求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Part of agility is the ability to quickly deploy and implement AWS resources, which allows users to quickly respond to business needs.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS建立新區域的速度與使用者的敏捷性沒有直接關係。這是AWS內部的營運能力，而不是使用者使用雲端運算敏捷性的體現。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The speed at which AWS establishes new regions is not directly related to the user's agility. This is AWS's internal operational capabilities, rather than a reflection of the user's agility in using cloud computing.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：敏捷性還包括快速實驗的能力，使用者可以使用AWS的按需資源來快速測試和迭代。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Agility also includes the ability to quickly experiment, and users can use AWS's on-demand resources to quickly test and iterate.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：消除容量浪費是雲端運算的好處之一，但它屬於成本最佳化的範疇，而不是敏捷性的直接體現。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Eliminating wasted capacity is one of the benefits of cloud computing, but it falls into the realm of cost optimization rather than a direct reflection of agility.

E.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：進入雲端運算的成本低是雲端運算的經濟優勢，而不是敏捷性的體現。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The low cost of entering cloud computing is an economic advantage of cloud computing, not a reflection of agility.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS 資源實施的速度；C. 快速試驗的能力
answer_text.en: A. The speed at which AWS resources are implemented; C. The ability to experiment quickly

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AC (86%) 14%。考點摘要：敏捷性的一部分是快速部署和實施AWS資源的能力，這使得使用者能夠快速回應業務需求。；敏捷性還包括快速實驗的能力，使用者可以使用AWS的按需資源來快速測試和迭代。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AC (86%) 14%. Key point: Part of agility is the ability to quickly deploy and implement AWS resources, which allows users to quickly respond to business needs.; Agility also includes the ability to quickly experiment, and users can use AWS's on-demand resources to quickly test and iterate.

question_text.en: A company needs to block SQL injection attacks. Which AWS service or feature can meet this requirement?
question_text.zh: 一家公司需要阻止 SQL 注入攻擊。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足此要求？

A.en: AWS WAF
A.zh: AWS WAF

B.en: AWS Shield
B.zh: AWS Shield

C.en: Network ACLs
C.zh: 網路 ACL

D.en: Security groups
D.zh: 安全組

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS WAF 檢查 Web 請求，並可以使用託管或自訂 Web ACL 規則阻止 SQL 注入模式。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS WAF inspects web requests and can block SQL injection patterns by using managed or custom web ACL rules.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Shield 可防禦分散式阻斷服務攻擊，且不會檢查 SQL 注入負載的應用程式層請求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Shield protects against distributed denial-of-service attacks and does not inspect application-layer requests for SQL injection payloads.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：網路 ACL 在子網路邊界按網路協定、連線埠和 IP 位址過濾流量，但它們不會檢查 HTTP 請求內容中的 SQL 注入模式。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Network ACLs filter traffic by network protocol, port, and IP address at the subnet boundary, but they do not inspect HTTP request content for SQL injection patterns.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：安全性群組按協定、連線埠以及來源或目標過濾流量，但它們不會檢查 HTTP 請求內容中的 SQL 注入模式。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Security groups filter traffic by protocol, port, and source or destination, but they do not inspect HTTP request content for SQL injection patterns.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS WAF

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。考點摘要：AWS WAF 檢查 Web 請求，並可以使用託管或自訂 Web ACL 規則阻止 SQL 注入模式。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Key point: AWS WAF inspects web requests and can block SQL injection patterns by using managed or custom web ACL rules.

question_text.en: Which AWS service or feature identifies whether an Amazon S3 bucket or an IAM role has been shared with an external entity?
question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或功能可識別 Amazon S3 儲存桶或 IAM 角色是否已與外部實體共用？

A.en: AWS Service Catalog
A.zh: AWS 服務目錄

B.en: AWS Systems Manager
B.zh: AWS Systems Manager

C.en: AWS IAM Access Analyzer
C.zh: AWS IAM 存取分析器

D.en: AWS Organizations
D.zh: AWS Organizations

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Service Catalog主要用於組織和管理已核准的雲端資源集合，協助企業建立和管理服務目錄，與識別資源共享無關。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Service Catalog is mainly used to organize and manage approved cloud resource collections, helping enterprises establish and manage service catalogs, and has nothing to do with identifying resource sharing.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Systems Manager 是一項用於管理和操作 AWS 資源的服務。主要用於自動化任務、監控和維護，與識別資源共享無關。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Systems Manager is a service used to manage and operate AWS resources. It is mainly used for automated tasks, monitoring and maintenance, and has nothing to do with identifying resource sharing.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS IAM 存取分析器可協助使用者識別資源（例如 S3 儲存桶或 IAM 角色）是否與外部實體共用，並提供詳細的分析報告。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS IAM Access Analyzer can help users identify whether resources (such as S3 buckets or IAM roles) are shared with external entities and provide detailed analysis reports.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Organizations主要用於管理多個AWS帳戶的組織結構和許可權，與識別資源共享無關。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Organizations is mainly used to manage the organizational structure and permissions of multiple AWS accounts and has nothing to do with identifying resource sharing.

answer_text.zh: C. AWS IAM 存取分析器

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：AWS IAM 存取分析器可協助使用者識別資源（例如 S3 儲存桶或 IAM 角色）是否與外部實體共用，並提供詳細的分析報告。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: AWS IAM Access Analyzer can help users identify whether resources (such as S3 buckets or IAM roles) are shared with external entities and provide detailed analysis reports.

question_text.en: A cloud practitioner needs to obtain AWS compliance reports before migrating an environment to the AWS Cloud. How can these reports be generated?
question_text.zh: 雲端從業人員在將環境遷移到 AWS 雲端之前需要取得 AWS 合規性報告。如何產生這些報告？

A.en: Contact the AWS Compliance team.
A.zh: 聯絡 AWS 合規團隊。

B.en: Download the reports from AWS Artifact.
B.zh: 從 AWS Artifact 下載報告。

C.en: Open a case with AWS Support.
C.zh: 向 AWS Support 建立案例。

D.en: Generate the reports with Amazon Macie.
D.zh: 使用 Amazon Macie 產生報告。

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Artifact 是一款專門用於取得合規性報告的工具。使用者無需聯絡 AWS 合規團隊即可取得這些報告。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Artifact is a tool specifically designed to obtain compliance reports. Users do not need to contact the AWS Compliance team to obtain these reports.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS Artifact是AWS提供的一項服務，可讓使用者直接下載合規性報告和其他邊界檔案。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Artifact is a service provided by AWS that allows users to directly download compliance reports and other boundary documents.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：儘管 AWS Support 可以協助解決問題，但取得合規性報告不需要支援案例。可以直接透過AWS Artifact完成。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although AWS Support can help solve problems, obtaining compliance reports does not require a support case. It can be completed directly through AWS Artifact.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Macie 是一項資料安全服務，用於識別和保護敏感資料，不用於產生合規性報告。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Macie is a data security service used to identify and protect sensitive data and is not used to generate compliance reports.

answer_text.zh: B. 從 AWS Artifact 下載報告。
answer_text.en: B. Download the reports from AWS Artifact.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。考點摘要：AWS Artifact是AWS提供的一項服務，可讓使用者直接下載合規性報告和其他邊界檔案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Key point: AWS Artifact is a service provided by AWS that allows users to directly download compliance reports and other boundary documents.

question_text.en: An ecommerce company has migrated its IT infrastructure from an on-premises data center to the AWS Cloud. Which cost is the company’s direct responsibility?
question_text.zh: 一家電子商務公司已將其 IT 基礎設施從本地資料中心遷移到 AWS 雲端。哪些成本是公司的直接責任？

A.en: Cost of application software licenses
A.zh: 應用程式軟體授權成本

B.en: Cost of the hardware infrastructure on AWS
B.zh: AWS 上的硬體基礎設施成本

C.en: Cost of power for the AWS servers
C.zh: AWS 伺服器的電力成本

D.en: Cost of physical security for the AWS data center
D.zh: AWS 資料中心的實體安全成本

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：客戶仍然負責對公司選擇在 AWS 中執行的應用程式軟體進行許可，除非該許可證包含在所選服務或映像中。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The customer remains responsible for licensing the application software that the company chooses to run in AWS unless the license is included with the selected service or image.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS擁有並營運實體硬體基礎設施，其成本納入AWS服務定價而不是由客戶直接管理。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS owns and operates the physical hardware infrastructure, and its cost is incorporated into AWS service pricing rather than directly managed by the customer.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 為其資料中心的伺服器支付費用並管理電力；客戶為使用的 AWS 服務付費。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS pays for and manages power for the servers in its data centers; the customer pays for consumed AWS services.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 在責任共擔模式下負責其資料中心的實體安全。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS is responsible for physical security of its data centers under the shared responsibility model.

answer_text.zh: A. 應用程式軟體授權成本
answer_text.en: A. Cost of application software licenses

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。考點摘要：客戶仍然負責對公司選擇在 AWS 中執行的應用程式軟體進行許可，除非該許可證包含在所選服務或映像中。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Key point: The customer remains responsible for licensing the application software that the company chooses to run in AWS unless the license is included with the selected service or image.

question_text.en: A company is setting up AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) on an AWS account. Which recommendation complies with IAM security best practices?
question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 帳戶上設定 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)。哪項建議符合 IAM 安全最佳實務？

A.en: Use the account root user access keys for administrative tasks.
A.zh: 使用帳戶根使用者存取金鑰執行管理任務。

B.en: Grant broad permissions so that all company employees can access the resources they need.
B.zh: 授予廣泛的許可權，以便所有公司員工都可以存取他們需要的資源。

C.en: Turn on multi-factor authentication (MFA) for added security during the login process.
C.zh: 開啟多重身份驗證 (MFA) 以增強登入過程中的安全性。

D.en: Avoid rotating credentials to prevent issues in production applications.
D.zh: 避免輪換憑證以防止生產應用程式中出現問題。

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 最佳實務建議避免使用根使用者進行日常操作或繁瑣的任務。 root使用者的許可權太強大，使用root使用者的存取金鑰可能會帶來安全風險。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS best practices recommend avoiding using the root user for daily operations or tedious tasks. The root user's permissions are too powerful, and using the root user's access key may lead to security risks.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 最佳實踐建議遵循“最小許可權原則”，這意味著僅授予使用者完成工作所需的最低許可權。授予廣泛的許可權可能會導致安全性問題。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS best practices recommend following the "principle of least privilege", which means granting users only the minimum permissions they need to do their jobs. Granting broad permissions may cause security issues.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：解決方案：啟用多重身份驗證（MFA）是AWS安全最佳實踐之一，可顯著提高帳戶記錄的安全性並防止未經授權的存取。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Solution: Enabling multi-factor authentication (MFA) is one of AWS security best practices, which can significantly improve the security of account records and prevent unauthorized access.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 建議定期輪換憑證（例如存取金鑰）以降低憑證暴露的風險。避免輪換憑證可能會導致長期的安全風險。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS recommends regularly rotating credentials (such as access keys) to reduce the risk of credential exposure. Avoiding rotating credentials can lead to long-term security risks.

answer_text.zh: C. 開啟多重身份驗證 (MFA) 以增強登入過程中的安全性。
answer_text.en: C. Turn on multi-factor authentication (MFA) for added security during the login process.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：解決方案：啟用多重身份驗證（MFA）是AWS安全最佳實踐之一，可顯著提高帳戶記錄的安全性並防止未經授權的存取。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: Solution: Enabling multi-factor authentication (MFA) is one of AWS security best practices, which can significantly improve the security of account records and prevent unauthorized access.

question_text.en: Elasticity in the AWS Cloud refers to which of the following? (Choose two.)
question_text.zh: AWS 雲中的彈性指的是下列哪一項？ （選擇兩項。）

A.en: How quickly an Amazon EC2 instance can be restarted
A.zh: Amazon EC2 執行個體重新啟動的速度有多快

B.en: The ability to rightsize resources as demand shifts
B.zh: 隨著需求變化調整資源大小的能力

C.en: The maximum amount of RAM an Amazon EC2 instance can use
C.zh: Amazon EC2 執行個體可以使用的最大 RAM 量

D.en: The pay-as-you-go billing model
D.zh: 依量付費計量模型

E.en: How easily resources can be procured when they are needed
E.zh: 在需要時需要購買資源的難易程度。

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：重啟速度是例項恢復特性，並不定義雲彈性。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Restart speed is an instance recovery characteristic and does not define cloud elasticity.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：彈性包括隨著工作負載需求的變化增加或減少資源容量，以便配置的容量與當前需求相符。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Elasticity includes increasing or decreasing resource capacity as workload demand changes so that provisioned capacity matches current needs.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：執行個體型別的最大 RAM 是固定的硬體特性，並不會描述隨需求調整容量的能力。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: An instance type's maximum RAM is a fixed hardware characteristic and does not describe the ability to adjust capacity with demand.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：按量付費定價是彈性的補充，但它是一種計費模式，而不是彈性本身的定義。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Pay-as-you-go pricing complements elasticity, but it is a billing model rather than the definition of elasticity itself.

E.zh: 正確。技術原因：彈性雲資源可以在需求出現或消退時快速取得和釋放，這是彈性的核心面向。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: Elastic cloud resources can be procured and released quickly when demand appears or subsides, which is a core aspect of elasticity.

answer_text.zh: B. 隨著需求變化調整資源大小的能力；E. 在需要時需要購買資源的難易程度。
answer_text.en: B. The ability to rightsize resources as demand shifts; E. How easily resources can be procured when they are needed

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BE (94%) 6%。考點摘要：彈性包括隨著工作負載需求的變化增加或減少資源容量，以便配置的容量與當前需求相符。；彈性雲資源可以在需求出現或消退時快速取得和釋放，這是彈性的核心面向。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BE (94%) 6%. Key point: Elasticity includes increasing or decreasing resource capacity as workload demand changes so that provisioned capacity matches current needs.; Elastic cloud resources can be procured and released quickly when demand appears or subsides, which is a core aspect of elasticity.

question_text.en: Which service enables customers to audit API calls in their AWS accounts?
question_text.zh: 哪種服務允許客戶審核其 AWS 帳戶中的 API 呼叫？

A.en: AWS CloudTrail
A.zh: AWS CloudTrail

B.en: AWS Trusted Advisor
B.zh: AWS 可信任顧問

C.en: Amazon Inspector
C.zh: Amazon Inspector

D.en: AWS X-Ray
D.zh: AWS X-Ray

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS CloudTrail 是一項專門用於記錄和審核 API 呼叫的服務。它可以追蹤使用者活動和 API 請求，幫助客戶瞭解誰在何時操作 AWS 資源。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS CloudTrail is a service specifically designed to log and audit API calls. It can track user activities and API requests to help customers understand who operates AWS resources when.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Trusted Advisor是一個最佳化工具，用於檢查帳戶安全性、成本效率、效能等，但不負責審核API呼叫。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Trusted Advisor is an optimization tool used to check account security, cost efficiency, performance, etc., but it is not responsible for auditing API calls.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Inspector 是一項安全評估服務，用於檢查應用程式是否有安全漏洞和合規性問題，但它不會記錄 API 呼叫。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Inspector is a security assessment service that checks applications for security vulnerabilities and compliance issues, but it does not log API calls.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS X-Ray 是一種去中心化追蹤服務，用於分析和偵錯應用程式效能問題，但不負責審核 API 呼叫。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS X-Ray is a decentralized tracing service used to analyze and debug application performance issues, but it is not responsible for auditing API calls.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS CloudTrail

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。考點摘要：AWS CloudTrail 是一項專門用於記錄和審核 API 呼叫的服務。它可以追蹤使用者活動和 API 請求，幫助客戶瞭解誰在何時操作 AWS 資源。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Key point: AWS CloudTrail is a service specifically designed to log and audit API calls. It can track user activities and API requests to help customers understand who operates AWS resources when.

question_text.en: What is a customer responsibility when using AWS Lambda according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_text.zh: 根據 AWS 責任共擔模型，使用 AWS Lambda 時客戶的責任為何？

A.en: Managing the code within the Lambda function
A.zh: 管理 Lambda 函式中的程式碼

B.en: Confirming that the hardware is working in the data center
B.zh: 確認硬體在資料中心中正常運作

C.en: Patching the operating system
C.zh: 修補作業系統

D.en: Shutting down Lambda functions when they are no longer in use
D.zh: 當不再使用 Lambda 函式時將其關閉

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：客戶編寫、保護、測試和維護每個 Lambda 函式中部署的應用程式程式碼和相依性。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The customer writes, secures, tests, and maintains the application code and dependencies deployed in each Lambda function.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 操作並驗證其資料中心內的實體硬體，因此該任務屬於 AWS 而不是 Lambda 客戶。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS operates and verifies the physical hardware in its data centers, so this task belongs to AWS rather than the Lambda customer.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 修補並維護託管 Lambda 執行環境的底層作業系統。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS patches and maintains the underlying operating system for the managed Lambda execution environment.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Lambda 根據呼叫啟動和停止執行環境，因此客戶無需手動關閉空閒函式。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Lambda starts and stops execution environments in response to invocations, so customers do not manually shut down idle functions.

answer_text.zh: A. 管理 Lambda 函式中的程式碼
answer_text.en: A. Managing the code within the Lambda function

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。考點摘要：客戶編寫、保護、測試和維護每個 Lambda 函式中部署的應用程式程式碼和相依性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Key point: The customer writes, secures, tests, and maintains the application code and dependencies deployed in each Lambda function.

question_text.en: A company has 5 TB of data stored in Amazon S3. The company plans to occasionally run queries on the data for analysis. Which AWS service should the company use to run these queries in the MOST cost-effective manner?
question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon S3 中儲存了 5 TB 的資料。該公司計劃偶爾對資料進行查詢以進行分析。公司應使用哪種 AWS 服務以最具成本效益的方式來執行這些查詢？

A.en: Amazon Redshift
A.zh: Amazon Redshift

B.en: Amazon Athena
B.zh: Amazon Athena

C.en: Amazon Kinesis
C.zh: Amazon Kinesis

D.en: Amazon RDS
D.zh: Amazon RDS

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：它是一種適合處理結構化資料的大規模分析任務的資料倉儲服務。雖然可以用來分析資料，但通常需要將資料匯入到Redshift中，而不是直接查詢S3上的資料。因此，這不是直接查詢 S3 資料的最佳選擇。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: It is a data warehousing service suitable for large-scale analysis tasks of processing structured data. Although it can be used to analyze data, it usually requires importing the data into Redshift rather than directly querying the data on S3. Therefore, this is not the best option for querying S3 data directly.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：Amazon Athena 直接針對 Amazon S3 中的資料執行無伺服器 SQL 查詢，並按掃描的資料收費，適合偶爾進行分析，無需維護叢集。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon Athena runs serverless SQL queries directly against data in Amazon S3 and charges by data scanned, which fits occasional analysis without maintaining a cluster.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Kinesis 攝取和處理流資料，而不是對現有 S3 資料集進行偶爾 SQL 查詢的服務。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Kinesis ingests and processes streaming data and is not the service for occasional SQL queries over an existing S3 dataset.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon RDS 是託管關聯式資料庫，需要載入資料並操作資料庫容量，而不是直接查詢 S3。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon RDS is a managed relational database and would require loading the data and operating database capacity instead of querying S3 directly.

answer_text.zh: B. Amazon Athena

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (98%) 2%。考點摘要：Amazon Athena 直接針對 Amazon S3 中的資料執行無伺服器 SQL 查詢，並按掃描的資料收費，適合偶爾進行分析，無需維護叢集。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (98%) 2%. Key point: Amazon Athena runs serverless SQL queries directly against data in Amazon S3 and charges by data scanned, which fits occasional analysis without maintaining a cluster.

question_text.en: Which AWS service can be used at no additional cost?
question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服務可以免費使用？

A.en: Amazon SageMaker
A.zh: Amazon SageMaker

B.en: AWS Config
B.zh: AWS Config

C.en: AWS Organizations
C.zh: AWS 組織

D.en: Amazon CloudWatch
D.zh: Amazon CloudWatch

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon SageMaker 資源和使用會產生服務費。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon SageMaker resources and usage incur service charges.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Config 記錄和評估資源配置，通常會產生配置專案和規則評估費用。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Config records and evaluates resource configurations and generally incurs charges for configuration items and rule evaluations.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS Organizations 免費提供；客戶只需為會員帳戶使用的 AWS 資源付費。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Organizations is offered at no additional charge; customers pay only for AWS resources used by member accounts.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon CloudWatch 包含免費套餐，但許多指標、日誌、警報和控制面板會產生超出該套餐的費用。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon CloudWatch includes a free tier, but many metrics, logs, alarms, and dashboards incur charges beyond that tier.

answer_text.zh: C. AWS 組織

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (91%) 9%。考點摘要：AWS Organizations 免費提供；客戶只需為會員帳戶使用的 AWS 資源付費。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (91%) 9%. Key point: AWS Organizations is offered at no additional charge; customers pay only for AWS resources used by member accounts.

question_text.en: Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) capability belongs to the people perspective?
question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 功能屬於人員視角？

A.en: Data architecture
A.zh: 資料架構

B.en: Event management
B.zh: 事件管理

C.en: Cloud fluency
C.zh: 雲端流暢度

D.en: Strategic partnership
D.zh: 策略夥伴

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：資料架構屬於“平臺視角”，與技術和架構相關，而不是“人視角”。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Data architecture belongs to the "Platform Perspective", which is related to technology and architecture, rather than the "People Perspective".

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：事件管理通常與「營運觀點」相關，涉及事件回應和營運流程，而不是「人員觀點」。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Incident management is often associated with the "Operations Perspective", involving incident response and operations processes, rather than the "People Perspective".

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：雲端流暢度是「人視角」中的關鍵能力，旨在提高員工對雲端技術的理解和技能，以支援雲端遷移和採用。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Cloud fluency is a key capability in the "People Perspective", which aims to improve employees' understanding and skills of cloud technology to support cloud migration and adoption.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：策略夥伴關係是“業務視角”，與業務目標和合作夥伴相關，而不是“人員視角”。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Strategic partnerships are a “Business Perspective” and are related to business goals and partners, not a “People Perspective”.

answer_text.zh: C. 雲端流暢度

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：雲端流暢度是「人視角」中的關鍵能力，旨在提高員工對雲端技術的理解和技能，以支援雲端遷移和採用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: Cloud fluency is a key capability in the "People Perspective", which aims to improve employees' understanding and skills of cloud technology to support cloud migration and adoption.

question_text.en: A company wants to make an upfront commitment for continued use of its production Amazon EC2 instances in exchange for a reduced overall cost. Which pricing options meet these requirements with the LOWEST cost? (Choose two.)
question_text.zh: 一家公司希望預先承諾繼續使用其生產 Amazon EC2 例項，以換取整體成本的降低。哪些定價選項能夠以最低的成本滿足這些要求？ （選擇兩項。）

A.en: Spot Instances
A.zh: 現貨例項

B.en: On-Demand Instances
B.zh: 按需例項

C.en: Reserved Instances
C.zh: 預留例項

D.en: Savings Plans
D.zh: 節省計劃

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Spot 例項可能價格低廉，但使用可中斷的備用容量，並且不會用預先的長期生產承諾來換取穩定的折扣。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Spot Instances can be inexpensive but use interruptible spare capacity and do not exchange an upfront long-term production commitment for a stable discount.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：按需定價不需要承諾，因此不提供基於承諾的最低折扣。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: On-Demand pricing requires no commitment and therefore does not provide the lowest commitment-based discount.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：預留執行個體對符合條件的 EC2 使用提供折扣，以換取一年或三年的承諾，並提供可以包含預付款的付款選項。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Reserved Instances discount eligible EC2 usage in exchange for a one- or three-year commitment, with payment options that can include an upfront amount.

D.zh: 正確。技術原因：Savings Plans 降低符合條件的計算價格，以換取一年或三年的一致使用承諾。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Savings Plans reduce eligible compute prices in exchange for a one- or three-year consistent usage commitment.

E.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：專用主機提供用於授權或合規性的專用實體伺服器，並非一般生產例項的最低成本承諾選項。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Dedicated Hosts provide dedicated physical servers for licensing or compliance and are not the lowest-cost commitment option for ordinary production instances.

answer_text.zh: C. 預留例項；D. 節省計劃
answer_text.en: C. Reserved Instances; D. Savings Plans

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：CD (91%) 6%。考點摘要：預留執行個體對符合條件的 EC2 使用提供折扣，以換取一年或三年的承諾，並提供可以包含預付款的付款選項。；Savings Plans 降低符合條件的計算價格，以換取一年或三年的一致使用承諾。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: CD (91%) 6%. Key point: Reserved Instances discount eligible EC2 usage in exchange for a one- or three-year commitment, with payment options that can include an upfront amount.; Savings Plans reduce eligible compute prices in exchange for a one- or three-year consistent usage commitment.

question_text.en: A company wants to migrate its on-premises relational databases to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to use infrastructure as close to its current geographical location as possible. Which AWS service or resource should the company use to select its Amazon RDS deployment area?
question_text.zh: 一家公司希望將其本地關聯式資料庫遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望使用盡可能靠近其當前地理位置的基礎設施。公司應使用哪種 AWS 服務或資源來選擇其 Amazon RDS 部署區域？

A.en: Amazon Connect
A.zh: Amazon Connect

B.en: AWS Wavelength
B.zh: AWS Wavelength

C.en: AWS Regions
C.zh: AWS 區域

D.en: AWS Direct Connect
D.zh: AWS Direct Connect

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Connect 是一項聯絡中心服務，未定義 RDS 基礎架構的部署位置。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Connect is a contact center service and does not define where RDS infrastructure is deployed.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Wavelength 將選定的服務置於電信網路邊緣，並非 RDS 部署的標準地理邊界。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Wavelength places selected services at telecommunications network edges and is not the standard geographic boundary for an RDS deployment.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS 區域是獨立的地理區域，客戶選擇在其目前位置附近部署 RDS 並滿足延遲或駐留需求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Regions are separate geographic areas that customers select to deploy RDS close to their current location and meet latency or residency needs.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Direct Connect 提供到 AWS 的專用網路連線，但不選擇地理部署區域。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Direct Connect provides private network connectivity to AWS but does not select the geographic deployment area.

answer_text.zh: C. AWS 區域

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：AWS 區域是獨立的地理區域，客戶選擇在其目前位置附近部署 RDS 並滿足延遲或駐留需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: AWS Regions are separate geographic areas that customers select to deploy RDS close to their current location and meet latency or residency needs.

question_text.en: A company is exploring the use of the AWS Cloud, and needs to create a cost estimate for a project before the infrastructure is provisioned. Which AWS service or feature can be used to estimate costs before deployment?
question_text.zh: 一家公司正在探索 AWS 雲端的使用，需要在配置基礎架構之前為專案建立成本估算。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可用於部署前估算成本？

A.en: AWS Free Tier
A.zh: AWS 免費方案

B.en: AWS Pricing Calculator
B.zh: AWS 定價計算器

C.en: AWS Billing and Cost Management
C.zh: AWS 帳單和成本管理

D.en: AWS Cost and Usage Report
D.zh: AWS 成本和使用報告

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 免費套餐提供免費試用，但它不是估算成本的工具。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Free Tier offers a free trial, but it is not a tool for estimating costs.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS定價計算器是一款專門幫助使用者在購買前估算成本的工具。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Pricing Calculator is a tool specially designed to help users estimate the cost before purchasing.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 帳單和成本管理用於計費和檢查實際使用成本，而不是估計成本。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Billing and Cost Management is used for billing and checking actual usage costs, not for estimated costs.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS成本和使用報告提供資源使用後詳細的歷史使用情況和成本資料；它不是部署前的評估工具。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The AWS Cost and Usage Report provides detailed historical usage and cost data after resources are used; it is not a pre-deployment estimating tool.

answer_text.zh: B. AWS 定價計算器

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。考點摘要：AWS定價計算器是一款專門幫助使用者在購買前估算成本的工具。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Key point: AWS Pricing Calculator is a tool specially designed to help users estimate the cost before purchasing.

question_text.en: A company is building an application that needs to deliver images and videos globally with minimal latency. Which approach can the company use to accomplish this in a cost effective manner?
question_text.zh: 一家公司正在建立一個應用程式，需要以最小的延遲在全球範圍內傳送影象和視訊。公司可以使用哪種方法以具有成本效益的方式實現這一目標？

A.en: Deliver the content through Amazon CloudFront.
A.zh: Deliver the content through Amazon CloudFront.

B.en: Store the content on Amazon S3 and enable S3 cross-region replication.
B.zh: Store the content on Amazon S3 and enable S3 cross-region replication.

C.en: Implement a VPN across multiple AWS Regions.
C.zh: Implement a VPN across multiple AWS Regions.

D.en: Deliver the content through AWS PrivateLink.
D.zh: Deliver the contentough頭

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：Amazon CloudFront 在全球分佈的邊緣位置快取影像和影片，從而減少檢視器延遲，而無需在每個 AWS 區域中進行複製。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon CloudFront caches images and videos at globally distributed edge locations, reducing viewer latency without requiring copies in every AWS Region.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：S3 跨區域複製建立額外的區域物件副本以實現合規性或彈性，但缺乏 CloudFront 的全域邊緣快取並增加儲存成本。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 Cross-Region Replication creates additional regional object copies for compliance or resilience but lacks CloudFront's global edge caching and adds storage cost.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：VPN 提供加密的專用連線，既不會在邊緣位置快取內容，也不會最佳化全球媒體傳輸。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A VPN provides encrypted private connectivity and neither caches content at edge locations nor optimizes global media delivery.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS PrivateLink 透過 VPC 終端節點提供對服務的私人訪問，並非全球內容交付網路。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS PrivateLink provides private access to services through VPC endpoints and is not a global content delivery network.

answer_text.zh: A. Deliver the content through Amazon CloudFront.
answer_text.en: A. Deliver the content through Amazon CloudFront.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。考點摘要：Amazon CloudFront 在全球分佈的邊緣位置快取影像和影片，從而減少檢視器延遲，而無需在每個 AWS 區域中進行複製。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Key point: Amazon CloudFront caches images and videos at globally distributed edge locations, reducing viewer latency without requiring copies in every AWS Region.

question_text.en: Which option is a benefit of the economies of scale based on the advantages of cloud computing?
question_text.zh: 哪一種選擇更有利於基於雲端運算優勢的規模經濟？

A.en: The ability to trade variable expense for fixed expense
A.zh: 將變動費用換成固定費用的能力

B.en: Increased speed and agility
B.zh: 提高速度和敏捷性

C.en: Lower variable costs over fixed costs
C.zh: 相對固定成本降低變動成本

D.en: Increased operational costs across data centers
D.zh: 跨資料中心的營運成本增加

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：雲端運算的一個主要優點是它將固定成本轉換為可變成本，而不是相反。使用者可以根據實際需求按需付費，無需提前投入大量固定成本。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A major advantage of cloud computing is that it converts fixed costs into variable costs, rather than the other way around. Users can pay on-demand according to actual needs without having to invest a large amount of fixed costs in advance.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：雖然提高速度和敏捷性是雲端運算的優勢之一，但它與業務效率沒有直接關係。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although increased speed and agility are one of the advantages of cloud computing, it is not directly related to business efficiency.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：雲端運算透過經濟效率降低單位成本（如儲存和運算資料成本），使變動成本低於固定成本。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Cloud computing reduces unit costs (such as storage and computing data costs) through economic efficiency, making variable costs lower than fixed costs.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：雲端運算的目標是降低營運成本，而不是增加成本。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The goal of cloud computing is to reduce operating costs, not increase costs.

answer_text.zh: C. 相對固定成本降低變動成本
answer_text.en: C. Lower variable costs over fixed costs

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (92%) 6%。考點摘要：雲端運算透過經濟效率降低單位成本（如儲存和運算資料成本），使變動成本低於固定成本。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (92%) 6%. Key point: Cloud computing reduces unit costs (such as storage and computing data costs) through economic efficiency, making variable costs lower than fixed costs.

question_text.en: Which of the following is a software development framework that a company can use to define cloud resources as code and provision the resources through AWS CloudFormation?
question_text.zh: 下列哪一項是公司可以用來將雲端資源定義為程式碼並透過 AWS CloudFormation 預置資源的軟體開發框架？

A.en: AWS CLI
A.zh: AWS CLI

B.en: AWS Developer Center
B.zh: AWS 開發人員中心

C.en: AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK)
C.zh: AWS 雲端開發套件 (AWS CDK)

D.en: AWS CodeStar
D.zh: AWS CodeStar

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS CLI是一個用於與AWS服務互動的命令列工具，但它不是一個框架，不能直接將雲端資源定義為程式碼。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The AWS CLI is a command-line tool for interacting with AWS services, but it is not a framework and cannot directly define cloud resources as code.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS開發者中心是一個資源中心，提供開發者工具和檔案，但它不是框架，不能用於定義和管理雲端資源。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Developer Center is a resource center that provides developer tools and archives, but it is not a framework and cannot be used to define and manage cloud resources.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS CDK是一個軟體開發框架，可讓開發人員使用熟悉的程式語言（例如Python、JavaScript等）將雲端資源定義為程式碼，並透過AWS CloudFormation部署和管理資源。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS CDK is a software development framework that allows developers to use familiar programming languages ​​​​(such as Python, JavaScript, etc.) to define cloud resources as codes, and deploy and manage resources through AWS CloudFormation.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS CodeStar是一種用於快速開發、建置和部署應用程式的服務，但它不是框架，不能直接將雲端資源定義為程式碼。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS CodeStar is a service for quickly developing, building, and deploying applications, but it is not a framework and cannot directly define cloud resources as code.

answer_text.zh: C. AWS 雲端開發套件 (AWS CDK)
answer_text.en: C. AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK)

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：AWS CDK是一個軟體開發框架，可讓開發人員使用熟悉的程式語言（例如Python、JavaScript等）將雲端資源定義為程式碼，並透過AWS CloudFormation部署和管理資源。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: AWS CDK is a software development framework that allows developers to use familiar programming languages ​​​​(such as Python, JavaScript, etc.) to define cloud resources as codes, and deploy and manage resources through AWS CloudFormation.

question_text.en: A company is developing an application that uses multiple AWS services. The application needs to use temporary, limited-privilege credentials for authentication with other AWS APIs. Which AWS service or feature should the company use to meet these authentication requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家公司正在開發一個使用多個 AWS 服務的應用程式。應用程式需要使用臨時的、有限許可權的憑證來與其他 AWS API 進行身份驗證。公司應使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來滿足這些身分驗證要求？

A.en: Amazon API Gateway
A.zh: Amazon API Gateway

B.en: IAM users
B.zh: IAM 使用者

C.en: AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS)
C.zh: AWS 安全性令牌服務 (AWS STS)

D.en: IAM instance profiles
D.zh: IAM 執行個體設定檔

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon API Gateway 釋出、保護和管理 API；它不會為應用程式呼叫其他 AWS 服務頒發臨時 AWS 憑證。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon API Gateway publishes, secures, and manages APIs; it does not issue temporary AWS credentials for an application to call other AWS services.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：IAM 使用者通常使用長期憑證，因此他們不提供應用程式所需的臨時、有限生命週期憑證。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: IAM users normally use long-term credentials, so they do not supply the temporary, limited-lifetime credentials required by the application.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS STS 為經過驗證的 AWS API 請求頒發具有有限許可權和定義生命週期的臨時安全性憑證。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS STS issues temporary security credentials with limited permissions and a defined lifetime for authenticated AWS API requests.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：IAM 執行個體設定檔用於將 IAM 角色附加到 EC2 例項，但本身並不是產生臨時憑證的服務。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The IAM instance configuration file is used to attach an IAM role to an EC2 instance, but is not itself a service that generates temporary credentials.

answer_text.zh: C. AWS 安全性令牌服務 (AWS STS)
answer_text.en: C. AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS)

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：AWS STS 為經過驗證的 AWS API 請求頒發具有有限許可權和定義生命週期的臨時安全性憑證。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: AWS STS issues temporary security credentials with limited permissions and a defined lifetime for authenticated AWS API requests.

question_text.en: Which AWS service is a cloud security posture management (CSPM) service that aggregates alerts from various AWS services and partner products in a standardized format?
question_text.zh: 哪項 AWS 服務是雲端安全態勢管理 (CSPM) 服務，它以標準化格式聚合來自各種 AWS 服務和合作夥伴產品的警報？

A.en: AWS Security Hub
A.zh: AWS 安全中心

B.en: AWS Trusted Advisor
B.zh: AWS 可信任顧問

C.en: Amazon EventBridge
C.zh: Amazon EventBridge

D.en: Amazon GuardDuty
D.zh: Amazon GuardDuty

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS Security Hub 聚合並規範來自受支援的 AWS 服務和合作夥伴產品的安全結果，以提供安全狀況的集中檢視。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Security Hub aggregates and normalizes security findings from supported AWS services and partner products to provide a centralized view of the security posture.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Trusted Advisor 是一種最佳化推薦工具，主要用於檢查帳戶資源的最佳實踐（例如成本最佳化、安全性、效能等），而不是聚合安全警報。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Trusted Advisor is an optimization recommendation tool that is primarily used to examine best practices for account resources (such as cost optimization, security, performance, etc.) rather than to aggregate security alerts.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon EventBridge 是一種事件匯流排服務，用於連線應用程式和服務之間的事件流。儘管它可以傳遞事件，但它不是專用的 CSPM 服務，也不負責聚合安全警報。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EventBridge is an event bus service for connecting the flow of events between applications and services. Although it can deliver events, it is not a dedicated CSPM service and is not responsible for aggregating security alerts.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon GuardDuty 是一項威脅偵測服務，專注於識別潛在的安全威脅，但它不會聚合其他服務的警報。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service that focuses on identifying potential security threats, but it does not aggregate alerts from other services.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS 安全中心

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。考點摘要：AWS Security Hub 聚合並規範來自受支援的 AWS 服務和合作夥伴產品的安全結果，以提供安全狀況的集中檢視。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Key point: AWS Security Hub aggregates and normalizes security findings from supported AWS services and partner products to provide a centralized view of the security posture.

question_text.en: Which AWS service is always provided at no charge?
question_text.zh: 哪一項 AWS 服務始終免費提供？

A.en: Amazon S3
A.zh: Amazon S3

B.en: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
B.zh: AWS 身分識別與存取管理 (IAM)

C.en: Elastic Load Balancers
C.zh: 彈性負載平衡器

D.en: AWS WAF
D.zh: AWS WAF

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon S3 根據使用情況對儲存、請求、檢索和資料傳輸進行收費。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 charges for storage, requests, retrieval, and data transfer according to usage.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS IAM免費提供；客戶為透過 IAM 身分存取的其他 AWS 服務付費。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS IAM is provided without additional charge; customers pay for other AWS services accessed by IAM identities.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Elastic Load Balancing 按負載平衡器執行時間和處理的容量或資料收費。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Elastic Load Balancing charges for load balancer hours and processed capacity or data.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS WAF 對 Web ACL、規則和處理的請求收費。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS WAF charges for web ACLs, rules, and processed requests.

answer_text.zh: B. AWS 身分識別與存取管理 (IAM)
answer_text.en: B. AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (94%) 6%。考點摘要：AWS IAM免費提供；客戶為透過 IAM 身分存取的其他 AWS 服務付費。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (94%) 6%. Key point: AWS IAM is provided without additional charge; customers pay for other AWS services accessed by IAM identities.

question_text.en: To reduce costs, a company is planning to migrate a NoSQL database to AWS. Which AWS service is fully managed and can automatically scale throughput capacity to meet database workload demands?
question_text.zh: 為了降低成本，一家公司計劃將 NoSQL 資料庫遷移到 AWS。哪種 AWS 服務是完全託管的並且可以自動擴充套件吞吐量以滿足資料庫工作負載需求？

A.en: Amazon Redshift
A.zh: Amazon Redshift

B.en: Amazon Aurora
B.zh: Amazon Aurora

C.en: Amazon DynamoDB
C.zh: Amazon DynamoDB

D.en: Amazon RDS
D.zh: Amazon RDS

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Redshift 是一種資料倉儲服務，主要用於處理結構化資料和分析工作負載，而不是 NoSQL 資料庫。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Redshift is a data warehousing service mainly used for processing structured data and analytical workloads, rather than NoSQL databases.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Aurora 是一種關聯式資料庫服務，支援 MySQL 和 PostgreSQL 相容性，不適合 NoSQL 資料庫。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Aurora is a relational database service that supports MySQL and PostgreSQL compatibility and is not suitable for NoSQL databases.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是一項完全託管的 NoSQL 資料庫服務，可自動擴充套件吞吐量以滿足工作負載需求，非常適合成本最佳化和動態工作負載。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon DynamoDB is a fully managed NoSQL database service that automatically scales throughput capacity to meet workload demands, making it ideal for cost optimization and dynamic workloads.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon RDS 是一種關聯式資料庫服務，適用於結構化資料，而不是 NoSQL 資料庫。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon RDS is a relational database service, suitable for structured data, not NoSQL databases.

answer_text.zh: C. Amazon DynamoDB

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (96%) 4%。考點摘要：Amazon DynamoDB 是一項完全託管的 NoSQL 資料庫服務，可自動擴充套件吞吐量以滿足工作負載需求，非常適合成本最佳化和動態工作負載。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (96%) 4%. Key point: Amazon DynamoDB is a fully managed NoSQL database service that automatically scales throughput capacity to meet workload demands, making it ideal for cost optimization and dynamic workloads.

question_text.en: A company is using Amazon DynamoDB. Which task is the company’s responsibility, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_text.zh: 一家公司正在使用 Amazon DynamoDB。根據 AWS 責任共擔模型，哪一項任務是公司的責任？

A.en: Patch the operating system.
A.zh: 修補作業系統。

B.en: Provision hosts.
B.zh: 設定主機。

C.en: Manage database access permissions.
C.zh: 管理資料庫存取許可權。

D.en: Secure the operating system.
D.zh: 保護作業系統。

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是一項完全託管的服務，AWS 負責底層基礎架構的維護，包括作業系統修補程式。客戶不負責此任務。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon DynamoDB is a fully managed service, and AWS is responsible for the maintenance of the underlying infrastructure, including operating system patching. The customer is not responsible for this task.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：DynamoDB是無伺服器服務，客戶無需設定主機或管理底層硬體資源。這是 AWS 的責任。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: DynamoDB is a serverless service, and customers do not need to configure the host or manage the underlying hardware resources. This is AWS's responsibility.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：客戶配置 IAM 政策和其他授權控制，以確定誰可以存取 DynamoDB 表格以及他們可以執行哪些操作。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The customer configures IAM policies and other authorization controls that determine who can access DynamoDB tables and which actions they can perform.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：作業系統的安全性是AWS的責任，因為DynamoDB是託管服務，客戶可以直接存取底層作業系統。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The security of the operating system is the responsibility of AWS, because DynamoDB is a managed service, and customers have direct access to the underlying operating system.

answer_text.zh: C. 管理資料庫存取許可權。

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：客戶配置 IAM 政策和其他授權控制，以確定誰可以存取 DynamoDB 表格以及他們可以執行哪些操作。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: The customer configures IAM policies and other authorization controls that determine who can access DynamoDB tables and which actions they can perform.

question_text.en: A company has a test AWS environment. A company is planning on testing an application within AWS. The application testing can be interrupted and does not need to run continuously. Which Amazon EC2 purchasing option will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_text.zh: 某公司有一個測試AWS環境。一家公司正計劃在 AWS 中測試應用程式。應用程式測試可以中斷，不需要連續執行。哪種 Amazon EC2 購買選項能夠最經濟高效地滿足這些要求？

A.en: On-Demand Instances
A.zh: 按需例項

B.en: Dedicated Instances
B.zh: 專用例項

C.en: Spot Instances
C.zh: 現貨例項

D.en: Reserved Instances
D.zh: 預留例項

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：按需例項適用於需要靈活性和不可預測的工作負載的場景。雖然它不需要長期承諾，但它更昂貴，而且不是最具成本效益的選擇。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: On-Demand Instances are suitable for scenarios that require flexibility and unpredictable workloads. While it does not require a long-term commitment, it is more expensive and not the most cost-effective option.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：專用例項提供實體隔離，適用於需要滿足合規性或特殊硬體要求的場景。成本高，不適合測試環境。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Dedicated Instances provide physical isolation and are suitable for scenarios that need to meet compliance or special hardware requirements. The cost is high and not suitable for testing environment.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：Spot 例項：Spot 例項以比其他選項低得多的價格利用 AWS 的雲端運算功能。適用於可中斷的工作負載，使其成為測試環境的理想選擇。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Spot Instances: Spot instances take advantage of AWS's cloud computing capabilities at a significantly lower price than other options. Suitable for workloads that can be interrupted, making them ideal for testing environments.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：預留執行器需要長期承諾（1 或 3 年），適合某些生產工作負載。測試環境不需要長期承諾，因此不適合。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Reserved executors require a long-term commitment (1 or 3 years) and are suitable for certain production workloads. A test environment does not require a long-term commitment and is therefore not suitable.

answer_text.zh: C. 現貨例項

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：Spot 例項：Spot 例項以比其他選項低得多的價格利用 AWS 的雲端運算功能。適用於可中斷的工作負載，使其成為測試環境的理想選擇。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: Spot Instances: Spot instances take advantage of AWS's cloud computing capabilities at a significantly lower price than other options. Suitable for workloads that can be interrupted, making them ideal for testing environments.

question_text.en: Which AWS service gives users the ability to discover and protect sensitive data that is stored in Amazon S3 buckets?
question_text.zh: 哪種 AWS 服務使使用者能夠發現和保護儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中的敏感資料？

A.en: Amazon Macie
A.zh: Amazon Macie

B.en: Amazon Detective
B.zh: Amazon Detective

C.en: Amazon GuardDuty
C.zh: Amazon GuardDuty

D.en: AWS IAM Access Analyzer
D.zh: AWS IAM 存取分析器

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：Amazon Macie 是一項基於機器學習的服務，旨在發現、分類和保護 Amazon S3 中儲存的敏感資料。它可以自動識別敏感資訊（如個人識別資訊、財務資訊等）並提供保護建議。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon Macie is a machine learning-based service designed to discover, classify, and protect sensitive data stored in Amazon S3. It can automatically identify sensitive information (such as personally identifiable information, financial information, etc.) and provide protection recommendations.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Detective 是一項用於調查和分析安全問題的服務。它主要用於幫助使用者分析和視覺化安全事件，並不是專門為發現和保護敏感資料而設計的。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Detective is a service used to investigate and analyze security issues. It is mainly used to help users analyze and visualize security events, and is not specifically designed to discover and protect sensitive data.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon GuardDuty 是一項威脅偵測服務，可識別潛在的惡意活動和異常行為，但其設計目的不是發現和保護敏感資料。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service that identifies potentially malicious activity and anomalous behavior, but it is not designed to discover and protect sensitive material.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS IAM存取分析器是用於分析資源存取許可權的工具，可協助使用者識別資源是否被錯誤暴露，但不涉及敏感資料的發現和保護。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS IAM Access Analyzer is a tool used to analyze resource access rights, helping users identify whether resources have been mistakenly exposed, but it does not involve the discovery and protection of sensitive data.

answer_text.zh: A. Amazon Macie

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。考點摘要：Amazon Macie 是一項基於機器學習的服務，旨在發現、分類和保護 Amazon S3 中儲存的敏感資料。它可以自動識別敏感資訊（如個人識別資訊、財務資訊等）並提供保護建議。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Key point: Amazon Macie is a machine learning-based service designed to discover, classify, and protect sensitive data stored in Amazon S3. It can automatically identify sensitive information (such as personally identifiable information, financial information, etc.) and provide protection recommendations.

question_text.en: Which of the following services can be used to block network traffic to an instance? (Choose two.)
question_text.zh: 下列哪些服務可用於阻止例項的網路流量？ (選擇兩項。)

A.en: Security groups
A.zh: 安全群組

B.en: Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (Amazon VPC) flow logs
B.zh: Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (Amazon VPC) 串流日誌

C.en: Network ACLs
C.zh: 網路 ACL

D.en: Amazon CloudWatch
D.zh: Amazon CloudWatch

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：安全群組是例項級虛擬防火牆，可讓您拒絕入站和出站流量。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Security groups are instance-level virtual firewalls that allow you to deny inbound and outbound traffic.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：VPC流日誌用於捕捉網路流量的流向，但不能直接阻塞流量。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: VPC Flow Logs are used to capture the flow of network traffic, but cannot directly block the traffic.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：網路 ACL 是子網路層級防火牆，允許和拒絕入站和出站流量。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Network ACLs are subnet-level firewalls that allow and deny inbound and outbound traffic.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：CloudWatch是一種監控和管理服務，不能直接用於阻止網路流量。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudWatch is a monitoring and management service and cannot be used directly to block network traffic.

E.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：CloudTrail 用於記錄 API 呼叫和活動，無法直接阻止網路流量。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudTrail is used to log API calls and activity and cannot directly block network traffic.

answer_text.zh: A. 安全群組；C. 網路 ACL
answer_text.en: A. Security groups; C. Network ACLs

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AC (100%)。考點摘要：安全群組是例項級虛擬防火牆，可讓您拒絕入站和出站流量。；網路 ACL 是子網路層級防火牆，允許和拒絕入站和出站流量。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AC (100%). Key point: Security groups are instance-level virtual firewalls that allow you to deny inbound and outbound traffic.; Network ACLs are subnet-level firewalls that allow and deny inbound and outbound traffic.

question_text.en: Which AWS service can identify when an Amazon EC2 instance was terminated?
question_text.zh: 哪種 AWS 服務可以辨識 Amazon EC2 執行個體何時終止？

A.en: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
A.zh: AWS 身分與存取管理 (IAM)

B.en: AWS CloudTrail
B.zh: AWS CloudTrail

C.en: AWS Compute Optimizer
C.zh: AWS 運算最佳化器

D.en: Amazon EventBridge
D.zh: Amazon EventBridge

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：IAM 管理身分和許可權，但不維護顯示例項終止的事件歷史記錄。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: IAM manages identities and permissions but does not maintain the event history that shows instance termination.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS CloudTrail 記錄 EC2 API 活動，包括 TerminateInstances 事件及其事件時間，因此可以顯示執行個體何時終止。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS CloudTrail records EC2 API activity, including the TerminateInstances event and its event time, so it can show when an instance was terminated.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Compute Optimizer 建議資源配置，不作為終止事件的權威審核日誌。如果配置了規則，
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Compute Optimizer recommends resource configurations and does not serve as the authoritative audit log for termination events.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon EventBridge 可以對事件做出反應，但 CloudTrail 是記錄 API 呼叫並識別何時發生終止的服務。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EventBridge can react to events if a rule was configured, but CloudTrail is the service that records the API call and identifies when termination occurred.

answer_text.zh: B. AWS CloudTrail

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。考點摘要：AWS CloudTrail 記錄 EC2 API 活動，包括 TerminateInstances 事件及其事件時間，因此可以顯示執行個體何時終止。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Key point: AWS CloudTrail records EC2 API activity, including the TerminateInstances event and its event time, so it can show when an instance was terminated.
